name: Iso11783IL_TIMSetComplianceCertification
title: Iso11783IL_TIMSetComplianceCertification
syntax: long Iso11783IL_TIMSetComplianceCertification(dword testProtocolPublicationYear, dword testProtocolRevision, dword laboratoryType, dword laboratoryID, dword referenceNumber); // form 1

long Iso11783IL_TIMSetComplianceCertification(dbNode participant, dword testProtocolPublicationYear, dword testProtocolRevision, dword laboratoryType, dword laboratoryID, dword referenceNumber); // form 2
description: Sets the content of message ISOBUS Compliance Certification (see ISO11783-7 B.27).

If the ISOBUS Compliance Certification message is in the Tx list of the TIM node and a Request for PGN 64834 (FD42h) is received then the ISOBUS Compliance Certification message is sent using the specified parameter (ISOBUS Compliance Certification message revision is always 1).

parameters.name: testProtocolPublicationYear
parameters.description: The publication year of the compliance test protocol to which the certification test was performed. Range: 2000..2061.

parameters.name: testProtocolRevision
parameters.description: Revision of the compliance test performed. Range: 0..31.

parameters.name: laboratoryID
parameters.description: Manufacturer code of the laboratory that performed the compliance test. Range: 0..2047.

parameters.name: referenceNumber
parameters.description: Certification reference number assigned by a certification laboratory. Range: 0..65355.

parameters.name: participant
parameters.description: TIM participant (TIM server or TIM client).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
